ai_summary: This document from IFB Agro Industries Limited is a routine compliance filing notifying stock exchanges of its 44th Annual General Meeting scheduled for July 29, 2026, to be held virtually, and the distribution of its Annual Report 2025-2026. The company is disseminating the Annual Report primarily electronically, providing web-links to all members in adherence to SEBI Listing Regulations and a "Green Initiative." This is a standard corporate disclosure with no immediate material financial impacts or red flags identified beyond routine regulatory compliance.
